title: Festival of the Twin Gods
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Festival of the [[Twin Gods]]''' was a [[holiday]] among the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. It was celebrated in honor of [[Yun-Yammka]], the Slayer, and [[Yun-Harla]], the Trickster. Rather whimsical for the normally serious Yuuzhan Vong, the holiday was marked by a dropping of rules among the Yuuzhan Vong. For example, crèchlings would play tricks on their elders, without any fear of reprisal, while adult Yuuzhan Vong would often trade secrets with each other, even among [[Domain]] rivals.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-02-XX -->''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
